name: cifs-utils
title: cifs-utils
description:
Common Internet File System utilities
The SMB/CIFS protocol provides support for cross-platform file sharing with
Microsoft Windows, OS X, and other Unix systems.
.
This package provides utilities for managing mounts of CIFS network
file systems.

commands.name: cifscreds
commands.description: manage NTLM credentials in kernel keyring

commands.name: getcifsacl
commands.description: Userspace helper to display an ACL in a security descriptor for Common Internet File System (CIFS)

commands.name: setcifsacl
commands.description: Userspace helper to alter components of a security descriptor for Common Internet File System (CIFS)

commands.name: smb2-quota
commands.description: Userspace helper to display quota information for the Linux SMB client file system (CIFS)

commands.name: smbinfo
commands.description: Userspace helper to display SMB-specific file information for the Linux SMB client file system (CIFS)

commands.name: cifs.idmap
commands.description: Userspace helper for mapping ids for Common Internet File System (CIFS)

commands.name: cifs.upcall
commands.description: Userspace upcall helper for Common Internet File System (CIFS)

commands.name: mount.cifs
commands.description: mount using the Common Internet File System (CIFS)

commands.name: mount.smb3
commands.description: mount using the Common Internet File System (CIFS)
